x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_self_service_issue_config"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " DEX self-service issue configurations"; if (count >= 5) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " self-service configurations found. Employees can use AI-guided workflows to self-diagnose and resolve common device issues." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " self-service configuration(s) found (target: 5+). Configure additional issue types to maximize AI-guided employee deflection." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No DEX self-service issue configurations found. Employees cannot use AI-guided self-service workflows." }; }})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure DEX self-service issue definitions via dex_self_service_issue_config_list.do. Self-service configurations enable employees to diagnose and resolve their own device issues using AI-guided workflows — a key deflection capability that reduces service desk volume.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c22
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Self-service issue configurations enable employees to use AI-guided workflows to resolve their own device issues before contacting the service desk. Without these, a key DEX AI deflection capability is completely unavailable.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>DEX Self-Service Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) { var ga = new GlideAggregate("dex_self_service_issue_config"); ga.addAggregate("COUNT"); ga.query(); var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0; var actualValue = count + " DEX self-service issue configurations"; if (count >= 5) { return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " self-service configurations found. Employees can use AI-guided workflows to self-diagnose and resolve common device issues." }; } else if (count >= 1) { return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " self-service configuration(s) found (target: 5+). Configure additional issue types to maximize AI-guided employee deflection." }; } else { return { status: "not_ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No DEX self-service issue configurations found. Employees cannot use AI-guided self-service workflows." }; }})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>DEX</module> <number>CHK0006142</number> <order/> <remediation_guidance>Configure DEX self-service issue definitions via dex_self_service_issue_config_list.do. Self-service configurations enable employees to diagnose and resolve their own device issues using AI-guided workflows — a key deflection capability that reduces service desk volume.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>8603e33acfd903108935fb251d851c22</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
